overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit streets, the iconic Arasaka building, and atmospheric fog. The footage showcases high-end game engine graphics with ray-traced reflections and volumetric lighting typical of Cyberpunk 2077.

segments.scene_description: The clip opens on a rainy night in a cyberpunk city, walking along a sidewalk bordered by tall metal security fencing. A pedestrian in red walks past in the opposite direction as the camera approaches a foggy intersection with a red traffic light.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with palm trees and overhead lighting

agents.ego_description: walking under a covered walkway, passing pedestrians with glowing umbrellas

massive dark skyscraper with illuminated signage emerging from the fog
bright linear fluorescent lights under the building canopy illuminating the rain

segments.scene_description: Moving under a building overhang with overhead fluorescent lighting, the camera passes a pedestrian with a glowing orange umbrella. The massive Arasaka building begins to emerge from the fog on the left as palm trees line the walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: directly below Arasaka corporate building signage

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal the massive illuminated Arasaka corporate sign glowing white against the dark building facade. Rain streaks across the view as the camera focuses on the iconic cyberpunk architecture rising into the foggy night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: city intersection with crosswalks and traffic barriers

events.description: camera tilts back down to walking position and continues forward
crossing the street at intersection while traffic light is red

agents.ego_description: walking past the Arasaka building and crossing the wet street intersection

notable_agents.action: car with headlights on approaching slowly through the fog and rain

entered.detail: concrete and metal construction barriers lining the road edge
group of palm trees visible through the fog at the far side of the intersection

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts down and continues walking past the Arasaka building, crossing a wet intersection with construction barriers on the right. A car approaches through the fog with headlights cutting through the rain as the camera moves toward the opposite sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: street under elevated highway with red neon accent lighting

events.description: enters area beneath elevated highway or monorail track with red neon lights

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk under an overpass with red neon lights reflecting on wet surfaces

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass structure overhead with red neon strip lighting
horizontal red neon light strips mounted on the building facade
white painted bicycle symbol on the wet road surface

segments.scene_description: Entering the shadow of an elevated highway, the scene is bathed in red neon light from strips on the left building. The camera walks along the wet sidewalk beneath the massive concrete structure, with the rain creating reflective pools on the ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath transit infrastructure with view of sky above

events.description: camera tilts upward to show the overpass structure and foggy sky above

agents.ego_description: stops to look up at the structural beams of the overpass and the foggy sky visible through the gap between buildings

entered.detail: tall skyscraper visible through the gap in the overpass structure against the foggy sky

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal the intricate metal beams and girders of the overpass structure overhead. Through the gap between the elevated highway and buildings, a distant skyscraper rises into the foggy teal-colored sky, with rain falling through the opening.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rainy cyberpunk cityscape that transitions from a foggy street level to the imposing scale of corporate architecture and industrial overpasses. It begins on a wet sidewalk bordered by metal security fencing, moving past a pedestrian in red toward a foggy intersection under a red traffic light. As the camera passes under a fluorescent building overhang and a pedestrian with a glowing orange umbrella, the massive Arasaka building emerges from the mist, prompting the camera to tilt upward toward the glowing white corporate sign against the dark, rain-streaked sky. The view then tilts back down to cross a wet intersection with construction barriers and oncoming headlights before entering the deep shadows of an elevated highway bathed in red neon light. Finally, the camera tilts upward once more to reveal the intricate metal girders of the overpass, framing a distant skyscraper rising into a foggy teal sky.
